---
title: "Python Tools for Management Research"
---

This small site collects rendered course slides and supporting activity
materials. The repository remains the main home for notebooks, data, and project
files.


## Materials

segment | topic | materials
---|---|---
0a | Python, notebooks, and the course workflow | [slides](slides/0a.html){target="_blank"}
0b | Python basics I | [slides](slides/0b.html){target="_blank"}
0c | Python basics II | [slides](slides/0c.html){target="_blank"}
1a | Polars: read, inspect, transform, and write data | [slides](slides/1a.html){target="_blank"}
1b | Polars: aggregation, joins, and research data workflows | [slides](slides/1b.html){target="_blank"}
1c | Polars: reusable expressions, lazy queries, and project-scale patterns | [slides](slides/1c.html){target="_blank"}
2a | Git and GitHub for research projects | [slides](slides/2a.html){target="_blank"} / [activity](materials/2a_github.html){target="_blank"}
2b | Reproducible computing environments with devcontainers and Codespaces | [slides](slides/2b.html){target="_blank"} / [activity](materials/2b_devcontainers.html){target="_blank"}
2c | Python project and environment management | [slides](slides/2c.html){target="_blank"} / [activity](materials/2c_pyproject.html){target="_blank"}
3a | Quarto documents, citations, and references | [slides](slides/3a.html){target="_blank"} / [activity](materials/3a_quarto.html){target="_blank"}
3b | Quarto manuscripts with code-generated tables, figures, and results | [slides](slides/3b.html){target="_blank"} / [activity](materials/3b_results.html){target="_blank"}
3c | Quarto presentations and other research outputs | [slides](slides/3c.html){target="_blank"} / [activity](materials/3c_presentations.html){target="_blank"}
